name: VII Equity Bus Resources LLC
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate); SAFER returned no hits for 'VII EQUITY BUS RESOURCES', 'VII EQUITY BUS', or 'VII EQUITY'. Listed address 33140 Aurora Rd #3, Solon OH 44139 is a multi-tenant commercial building (also housed Town & Country Driving School - closed Dec 2025 - and The Serene Foundation). Ohio SOS public search returned HTTP 403 to scripted access; no public web record located for an LLC of this name. Likely a dissolved or never-formed shell, or a DBA tied to another driving/bus entity at that address.

name: Mckenzie School Bus SVC LLC
registry_source: Maryland SDAT (egov.maryland.gov/BusinessExpress); Bizapedia confirms entity exists
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). SAFER returned no hits for 'MCKENZIE SCHOOL BUS' or 'MCKENZIE BUS'. Sixteen MCKENZIE-named carriers exist in Allegany County MD area (most around Frostburg) but none branded as school bus; closest related is MCKENZIE FARM'S & TRANSPORT LLC (USDOT 3579094, Frostburg) - different entity. Bizapedia lists 'MCKENZIE SCHOOL BUS SERVICE, LLC' in Frostburg MD as an LLC but full registration details behind paywall. Likely a small private/intrastate school bus contractor; Allegany County school bus contractor.
